title: bromus rigens subsp. maximus
intro: Bromus rigens subsp. maximus, also known as tall bittercress, is a plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Bromus rigens subsp. maximus include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful for soothing digestive issues and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, and are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
